CreateNotificationPolicy.channel: Notification channel: phone, sms, email (required if any of phone/sms/email is selected), webhook (optional)
CreateNotificationPolicy.receiverType: Receiver type: user (individual user), userGroup (user group); required when phone/sms/email is selected, optional for webhook
CreateNotificationPolicy.webhookConfigList.webhookType: Webhook type: weCom (WeCom), dingTalk (DingTalk), lark (Lark), custom (custom webhook)
CreateNotificationPolicy.escalateConfigList.rank: Escalation level (1, 2, 3); escalates from level 1 to 2 to 3 if not acknowledged within the specified time
